---
title: ""
---

<div class="hero">
<div class="hero-text">

# Rita Wang

MSPH student in Epidemiology at Emory University, Rollins School of Public Health, with a Data Science Certificate.

My work combines epidemiologic methods and data science to produce clear, evidence-based insights for public health research.

<a class="btn-primary" href="projects.html">View Projects</a>

</div>
<div class="hero-image">

```{r, echo=FALSE, fig.align='center', out.width='100%'}
knitr::include_graphics("images/IMG_0495.JPG")
```

</div>
</div>

## What I Work On

- Epidemiologic analysis with reproducible workflows in R, SAS, and SQL
- Research on sleep and circadian health
- Data visualization and communication for public health decision-making
